notes: Confirmed on redken.com blog and professional shade-chart pages as acidic demi-permanent hair gloss/toner ('#1 demi-permanent hair color in the world').

Confirmed on official Creatives page: intermixable semi-permanent vivid shades (Trendy Chic and Classically Bold palettes), longevity up to 50 washes; Workbook PDF confirms 'KENRA COLOR CREATIVES ... intermixable semi-permanent colors', formulated without developer.

Confirmed on kenraprofessional.com landing page ('Get Permanent Color in 10 minutes') and Workbook PDF: 17 permanent shades processing in 10 minutes or less with Kenra Color Developer 10V-30V.

Confirmed on pravana.com color category page ('Pure Light Lighteners offer innovative lightening options') and official PDF: Pure Light Power Lightener (up to 7 levels of lift, blue dust-free powder) and Pure Light Ultra Lightener (up to 9 levels, ReUnite Mending Technology).

Status unclear: no Liquid Demi page exists on pulpriothair.com today (fetch of /products/haircolor/liquid-demi returned 404, and the site's color navigation shows only semi-permanent, FACTION8 permanent, and High Speed Toners); a salon blog explicitly states the Liquid Demis 'have since been discontinued', while some Canadian retailers still show stock.

Confirmed on official page: persulfate-based, dripless white formula mixed 1:3 with Pulp Riot developer to remove semi-permanent/direct-dye pigment; official copy notes it 'will lighten natural hair'.

Verified via official ruskprofessional.com downloadable-assets page, which hosts 'About Deepshine Xpress Gloss' and 'How to Use Deepshine Xpress Gloss' documents.

Verified on official site: 25+ vivid direct-dye shades (incl. 5 UV-reactive neons, Clear, Dopamine black), no developer needed, 35-minute room-temperature processing, ammonia/PPD/MEA/paraben-free, vegan.

Verified on official site: 56 acidic, zero-lift demi-permanent liquid gloss toner shades with vegan bonder; 1:1 with dedicated Gloss Toner Developer, 3-10 minute processing (30-35 min for grey blending).

Verified on official site: alkaline, progressive demi-permanent cream toners with bonder; mixed 1:2 to 1:3 with 5-volume Deluxe Cream Developer, 5-20 minute processing; core shades Cool Blonde, Silver, Violet (per CosmoProf listing).

brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Powder Lightener & Cream Lightener (with Bonding Complex)
notes: Verified on official blonding page: Powder Lightener (9+ levels of lift; Polycare Split + Arginine bonding complex, Ormagel seaweed) and the newer Cream Lightener (9+ levels, gentler, with jojoba and aloe vera), both used with Deluxe Cream Developers.

Verified on the official Epilogue site (dangerjonescreativeepilogue.com): brand's first permanent line, launched March 2026; 84 intermixable shades incl. high lifts and boosters, 100% grey coverage, PPD- and resorcinol-free, vegan bonding complex, 1:1 with Deluxe Cream Developer (5-40 vol), 35-45 min processing.
Launch corroborated by trade press (The Tease, 03/2026) and CosmoProf availability.
Verified on official mydentitycolor.com page: permanent crèmes with Miru-Style X-HP heat protection and VibraRiche technology; 1:1 with 10-40V developer, 30-40 minute processing.
Site footer: '© 2026 Henkel Corporation. All Rights Reserved.' confirms parent company; US purchasing is routed to CosmoProfBeauty.com.
Verified on official page: demi-permanent crèmes mixed 1:2 with dedicated 6V Demi-Permanent Developer, 5-25 minute processing.
Verified on official page: 7 fast-processing demi-permanent toner shades (Titanium, Sand Storm, Pearl, Misty Mauve, Golden Sand, Eclipse, Blush).
Verified on official page: 15-shade liquid demi-permanent range plus Clear; deposit-only, ammonia- and alcohol-free, 1:1 with 6V developer, 15-minute processing, lasts up to 25 shampoos.

Verified on official direct-dyes page: 9+ Super Power shades listed (Violet Sorcery, Titanium Shield, Sheer Power, Purple Raven, Pink Possession, Phoenix Fire, Ocean Reign, Night Warrior, Magenta Magic); no developer required, ~20-minute processing per retailer detail.
Verified on official education page: original Vibrant/Pastel direct dye range, no developer required, 20-minute processing, pre-lightening with Big9 recommended.
Note: only Super Power shades appear under the site's /direct-dyes/ product listing, so the original Vibrant/Pastel range may be transitioning to Super Power; education page is still live in 2026.
Verified on official page: creme lightener lifting up to 9 levels in a single application without heat; 1:1.5 mix for global application, on-scalp up to 20 volume.
Verified on official page: dust-free violet powder lightener, lifts up to 8 levels, 1:1 to 1:3 mixing with #mydentity developer.

issue_log.details: Direct fetch of https://www.redken.com/professional/haircolor returned mostly sign-up forms and navigation labels rather than product content; line enumeration for Redken relied on the navigation list and shade-chart page surfaced in search results (Blonde Idol, Blonde IQ, Color Fusion, Chromatics, Color Gels Lacquers, Shades ALK, Shades EQ, Color Camo).

Full product page verified only on the official Redken Australia/NZ site (redken.com.au); US redken.com confirms the line indirectly (Shades EQ Bonder Inside page and blog articles reference Flash Lift Bonder Inside). Marked region_or_market as global.
Chromatics is listed in the current redken.com haircolor navigation, but no live product page was confirmed; given long-running stylist reports of phase-out, status set to unclear.

The brief suggested 'SoColor Sync (Alchemy)'. Official matrix.com pages and the 2023 manual reference 'SoColor Sync Pre-Bonded'; the Alchemy sub-brand/relaunch name was not found on a fetched official page, so it is omitted from the verified name.
Magma verified only via Wella's official colour brand factsheet PDF (Wella-hosted Contentful asset), not on the US site; region set to global.

Chroma ID is confirmed in descriptions on official schwarzkopf-professional.com IGORA pages and corresponds to the 'Express Bonding Color Masks' block on the fetched US color landing page, but a dedicated Chroma ID product page was not directly fetched; official_line_url left null.

Goldwell's consumer-facing hair color portfolio page surfaced in search was the en-GB version; en-US verification came from goldwell.com en-US Color Guide and System Products education pages. Goldwell directs purchasing to the Kao Pro Store, so retail-level line pages are limited.
Seen only in matrix.com navigation; no product page fetched. Included with status 'unclear' and category 'unknown'.

issue_log.item: Wella Professionals::Color Renew / Perfecton / Color Fresh Masks
issue_log.details: These appear in Wella's official factsheet PDF but were not verified on live US web pages; only Color Fresh (Create/Masks) was included, grouped under the Color Fresh entry.

Line is documented by professional retailers and a dedicated developer (Liquid Demi 6.7 vol), but pulpriothair.com no longer lists it (direct fetch returned 404) and a salon source states it was discontinued. Marked unclear; could not find an official discontinuation notice.
Per hair2buy.co.uk, L'Oréal discontinued Pulp Riot distribution in the UK and Ireland as of September 30, 2024. US distribution (SalonCentric) continues. Inventory entries reflect US market.

Fetched pages (/products/haircolor, /products/lighteners, collection pages) render only header/intro text without product grids, so individual SKU/collection names within Lighteners could not be enumerated from HTML.

https://www.paulmitchellpro.com/professional-hair-color returned 404. Verification relied on official international Paul Mitchell sites (paulmitchell.co.th, paulmitchell.de), official education PDFs, official distributor Salon Success (UK), and trade press; affected lines are marked region 'global' instead of 'US'.

Referenced by third-party chart guides and search synthesis as a current 10-minute permanent line, but no official Paul Mitchell page confirming it was fetched. Included with apparent_status 'unclear'.

issue_log.item: Paul Mitchell lighteners (Dual-Purpose Lightener, Skylight, Bond Rx)
issue_log.details: Specific lightener product names appeared only in search-result synthesis, not on a fetched official page. The existence of Paul Mitchell lighteners as a category is supported by official Pop XG education materials, so a single lightener entry was logged as 'unclear' rather than enumerating unverified names.
Official paulmitchell.de still lists Pop XG as a salon-exclusive line, but search results indicate it may no longer be distributed in the US (e.g., not found at SalonCentric). Marked unclear.
Official Paul Mitchell US Facebook video confirms PM Shines was retired and replaced by The Demi. Included with apparent_status 'discontinued'.

pravana.com product pages display a 'Color Certification Program' modal for pro features; core line descriptions were still readable. Some structural details (e.g., full VIVIDS sub-collection roster) were cross-checked against the official Product Knowledge Guide PDF dated 2022, which may not reflect 2026 line changes.
Simply Blonde spans lighteners, toners, and ultra lifts per the official landing page; categorized as 'lightener' (primary positioning) rather than splitting into unverified sub-lines.

The joico.com Pro Color Shop page navigation shows a 'Chrome' item under Vero K-PAK in one menu variant, but no dedicated description was captured in fetched content, so it was noted within the Vero K-PAK entry rather than listed as a separate verified line.

Parent companies (Henkel for Joico/Kenra/Pravana, L'Oréal for Pulp Riot, John Paul Mitchell Systems for Paul Mitchell) are based on widely reported acquisitions and were not re-verified on official corporate pages during this session.

Listed in the prompt as a possible color line, but official sources (davinespro.com UK Mask page and an Allure article) describe Heart of Glass as a blonde care/maintenance and bonding-treatment family, not a hair color line. Excluded from the inventory.

Listed in the prompt as a possible color line, but Keune BLEND is a hair styling product line (gel, glue, de-frizz) launched in 2017, per retailer pages and a launch press article. No evidence of a Keune color line named Blend on keune.com. Excluded from the inventory.
No Aveda line named 'Vivids' or 'AVC' was found on official sources. Aveda's vivid/fashion-shade line is officially named Full Spectrum Vibrants (semi-permanent), which is included instead.
Direct fetch returned a Chromium error/JS shell rather than readable content. Individual line pages were instead verified via search-indexed content from davinespro.com line URLs.

Fetch returned only navigation and a sign-in form; line details were verified via individual line pages (Framcolor 2001, Framcolor Glamour, Decolor B) and the official Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF.

Appears as a permanent color line in the official framesiprofessional.com Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF but is absent from current framesi.it/en navigation and current US line pages found; marked apparent_status=unclear.

issue_log.item: Framesi Framcolor 2001 Intense / Eclectic 5D Color Gloss / Pure Pigment Plus
issue_log.details: Verified only via the framesi.it/en site navigation text (and, for 2001 Intense, the US product guide PDF); dedicated line page URLs were not captured, so official_line_url is null.

issue_log.item: Alfaparf BB Bleach and Color Wear / Color Wear Gloss Toner
issue_log.details: Verified via listings on the official alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage and int-en products page rather than dedicated line pages; official_line_url left null where no line-specific URL was confirmed.

Aveda's consumer site (aveda.com) describes color only as salon services; detailed line-level facts come from the official salon-facing brochure hosted on joinaveda.com (Aveda's professional recruitment/education site). Brochure data verified is dated 2023, fetched June 2026.
Verified via the official keune.com/keune-color overview page describing it as lightening powders plus toners; a dedicated Ultimate Blonde line page URL was not captured.

No Rusk line named 'In10sity' could be found on ruskprofessional.com or in credible search results. The brand's 10-minute color is officially 'RUSKin10' (RUSK IN 10); 'In10sity' appears to be a conflation. Recorded RUSKin10 instead.

Verified as an official L'Oréal Professionnel direct-dye line only on a non-US official site (lorealprofessionnel.nl). It is absent from the current us.lorealprofessionnel.com hair-color catalog, and reseller glamot.com lists all variants as permanently unavailable. Marked apparent_status=unclear, region=global.

Official US Dia Color page states Dia Richesse was 'reimagined' as Dia Color and publishes a Dia Richesse-to-Dia Color conversion chart, indicating US phase-out; status in other markets not verified, so logged as unclear rather than discontinued.
Verified only via official US-hosted PDF assets (Majirel color chart and how-to-use guides on us.lorealprofessionnel.com), not a dedicated product landing page; official_line_url set to null.

Verified on moroccanoil.com, but this is a retail/at-home temporary color-conditioning treatment, not a professional developer-mixed color line; included for completeness since the brief asked to verify it.

issue_log.item: Moroccanoil 'Color Depositing / Color Infusion / Color Rhapsody' brief wording
issue_log.details: All three exist, plus two lines not named in the brief: Color Calypso (demi-permanent gloss & cream) and Blonde Voyage lighteners (powder/clay/cream), both verified on official sources and added to the inventory.
A 'deepshine lighteners' collection link appears on the official Deepshine Direct page, but the dedicated collection page content was not fetched; SKU-level detail unverified.

Modern Salon (2026) reports Beauty Quest Group is relaunching RUSK under a unified 'RUSK Designer Collection' identity. Current color line names (Deepshine, RUSKin10) are still live on ruskprofessional.com, but naming/packaging may change during the relaunch.

Guessed URLs /hair-color-permanents and /hair-color-toners returned 404. Verified lines via working official pages instead: /hair-color-semi-permanents, /hair-color-blonding, /hair-color-gloss-toners-with-bonder, /hair-color-artistic-toners, and the dedicated dangerjonescreativeepilogue.com site.
Brand is independent/founder-led (David & Alexis Thurston; site footer 'Thurston A&R'). No corporate parent verified on an official source, so parent_company left null.
Official semi-permanent page references a 'Semi-Permanent Color Remover' product; excluded from the inventory as an ancillary remover rather than a color line.

issue_log.item: #mydentity Direct Dye Vibrant Pastel vs Super Power
issue_log.details: The official /direct-dyes/ product listing shows only Super Power Direct Dye shades, while the Vibrant/Pastel education page remains live. The original Vibrant/Pastel range may be superseded by Super Power; both recorded, with the caveat noted.

mydentitycolor.com is informational only; the site directs US purchases to CosmoProfBeauty.com and international buyers to regional distributors (e.g., mydentity.eu). Product pages carry minimal spec detail in some cases (e.g., Big9 'FEATURES' tab content not rendered in fetch).

Primary enumeration of Moroccanoil pro color lines came from the official Color Manual PDF hosted on moroccanoilprofessionals.com (lists Color Calypso Gloss/Cream, Color Rhapsody incl. High Lift and Ultimates, Color Infusion, Blonde Voyage Powder/Clay/Cream, developers/activators).
